ItacPersonItem.Notes: Possibly, this is the same Fulvia Spanocchi de` Sergardi to whom Scipione Bargagli dedicated the third part of `I Trattenimenti`. Fulvia Spanocchi was a poetess in the circle of the Accesi Academy in Siena, according to Laura Ricco` 1989.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
